title: What's new in Cloud SQL: Drive performance, high availability, and security
summary: Google Cloud announced new features in Cloud SQL supporting MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server with AI-driven capabilities for automated health management and fleet-wide insights. The update emphasizes performance optimization, high availability, and security improvements for mission-critical applications.
writeup: This video covers new Cloud SQL features across MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server, including AI-driven capabilities for automated health management and fleet-wide insights. It matters for teams running mission-critical applications that depend on consistent performance, uptime, and data protection. The concrete takeaways center on performance optimization, high availability, and security improvements, with attention to automated health management and cost management.
